steps.t: Thranduil's scouts Gardelen and Dínellas patrol the wood south-east of Torech Emel.
Dínellas followed a band of Orc-spies through Eryn Lasgalen. Gardelen believed the Orcs were bound for Caras Tilion, and you should seek the hunter Dí…
The Orc-spy slain by Dínellas can be found by his position near Caras Tilion.
Dínellas is near the ruins of the Elf-hall at Caras Tilion.
Legolas is near the ruins of the Elf-hall at Caras Tilion.
Legolas is near the ruins of the Elf-hall at Caras Tilion.
Thranduil is in his throne room in Felegoth.
